data.title: Festi hf. bought 165,000 own shares for 49,305,000 ISK in week 34 of 2025.
data.description: During the 34th week of 2025, Festi bought a total of 165,000 of its own shares for a sum of 49,305,000 Icelandic Krona.

data.title: China International Hardware Show 2025 in Shanghai offers direct market access, attracting global brands with workshops, tours, and activities.
data.description: During times of instability, chances for growth arise as major international brands confirm their involvement in upcoming events. Various additional programs such as workshops, industrial tours, and on-site activities will further enrich the experience. The bustling city of Shanghai will host these events starting on August 25, 2025. The support from EISENWARENMESSE – International Hardware ensures a successful and engaging event for all participants.

data.title: OrganOx exits at $1.5bn valuation, largest ever for BGF, showcasing importance of patient capital in UK medtech.
data.description: BGF, a leading growth capital investor in the UK and Ireland, has achieved its largest return ever with the exit of OrganOx at a valuation of $1.5 billion. This successful exit emphasizes the significance of patient capital in scaling up innovative medtech companies in the UK. The news was disclosed in London on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Crucial v3.0.1 hardfork upgrade for Conflux (CFX) Network on August 31, 2025. Node operators must update for stability.
data.description: The Conflux (CFX) Network has revealed plans for a significant v3.0.1 hardfork upgrade scheduled for August 31, 2025. Operators of nodes on the network are strongly advised to promptly carry out the update to maintain the stability of the network during this crucial transition.

data.title: Flow battery market to grow at 21.51% CAGR from 2025 to 2032 due to demand for energy storage systems with world turning towards renewables.
data.description: A notable surge is observed in the flow battery market as there is an increasing need for long-duration energy storage solutions, primarily driven by the global transition to renewable energy sources such as solar and wind. The market is witnessing substantial growth with key players like SkyQuest Technology Consulting contributing to this trend. The demand for flow batteries is particularly growing as more emphasis is placed on sustainability and efficiency in the energy sector. This growth is significant as global renewable energy capacity continues to expand, reaching record numbers. The market in Westford, Mass., has shown remarkable progress in this regard, with developments indicating a shift towards cleaner and more reliable energy storage options. The increasing adoption of flow batteries is crucial in meeting the energy storage requirements posed by the shift towards renewable energy, and this market trend is expected to continue in the foreseeable future.

data.title: Oculis appoints Mark Kupersmith, M.D. and Sebastian Wolf, M.D., Ph.D. as Chief Medical Advisors for neuro-ophthalmology and ophthalmology.
data.description: Oculis Holding AG, a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to combating eye and neurological eye disorders, revealed the addition of key medical advisors to its team. Mark Kupersmith, M.D. is now the Chief Medical Advisor for Neuro-Ophthalmology, and Sebastian Wolf, M.D., Ph.D. takes on the role of Chief Medical Advisor for Ophthalmology. Oculis Holding AG, listed on Nasdaq as OCS and XICE as OCS, seeks to address significant medical gaps in treatments for eye-related conditions.

data.title: Rita's introduces new fall Concretes, including Apple Butter and Pumpkin Pie flavors. PHILADELPHIA, Aug 25, 2025.
data.description: Rita's Italian Ice & Frozen Custard in Philadelphia is introducing a range of limited-time fall Concretes, including Apple Butter and Pumpkin Pie flavors. These treats offer a cozy and delicious taste. The company, known as the largest Italian Ice establishment, is currently promoting these seasonal offerings in response to the upcoming autumn season. The announcement was made on August 25, 2025. This new collection aims to provide customers with a taste of the season, moving away from traditional fall treats like sweaters and embracing the warmth that comes from enjoying spoonfuls of their unique flavors. Don't miss out on experiencing these comfort-filled treats!

data.title: CreatorWeek 2025 in Macao fuses Eastern and Western cultures in 5-day celebration Oct 24-28, 2025. Event hosted by MGTO and Branded.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that CreatorWeek Macao 2025, organized by Macao Government Tourism Office (MGTO) and Branded, is scheduled to take place from October 24-28, 2025. This event will concentrate on the global creator economy, culture, entertainment, and community aspects. During the five-day event, participants will have the opportunity to delve into Macao's dynamic offerings in these areas.

data.title: Trinasolar ranks first in ESG among global PV module manufacturers per BNEF report. Leading sustainability in industry.
data.description: In Changzhou, China, on August 25, 2025, BloombergNEF, a renowned renewable energy expert, unveiled a report examining the resilience and innovation of seven prominent PV module manufacturers in light of changing global market dynamics. Specifically, BNEF emphasized Trina Solar's performance amidst this evaluation.

data.title: Raythink launches CX20 series thermal cameras, including CX20, CX20 Pro, and CX20 Ultra, with 40mK thermal sensitivity.
data.description: Based in Yantai, China, Raythink Technology Co., Ltd. unveiled its latest CX20 series handheld thermal camera lineup on August 25, 2025. The series comprises the CX20, CX20 Pro, and CX20 Ultra models, all boasting cutting-edge thermal imaging technology with a remarkable thermal sensitivity of 40mK.

data.title: Marintec China 2025 set to return with largest scale in 22nd edition, happening in Shanghai from Dec 2-5; just 100 days left.
data.description: In Hong Kong on August 25, 2025, the countdown has officially started for the 22nd Marintec China, the most influential maritime exhibition in Asia. This highly-anticipated event will take place at the Shanghai New International Expo Centre (SNIEC) from December 2 to December 5. With only 100 days remaining, industry professionals are preparing to attend this prestigious exhibition, which will showcase the latest advancements and technologies in the maritime sector.
